title: Jumbo, Disney Classic Collection - The Little Mermaid, Disney Jigsaw Puzzles for Adults, 1,000 piece
features: The puzzle features your favourite Disney characters from The Little Mermaid
This puzzle is part of our Disney Classic Collection
The jigsaw puzzle has been produced using a high quality cardboard
description: From the manufacturer More Disney Classic Collection Puzzles... Dumbo Mickey 90th Anniversary Aladdin Even More Disney Classic's... Princess Selfies The Lion King Bambi Snow White More from Jumbo... Wasgij Wasgij is the original brainteaser jigsaw puzzle. Puzzlers have to use their imagination to piece together a "solution" to the illustration. Wasgij has been delighting and bamboozling puzzlers since 1997. Fun fact: Wasgij - is jigsaw spelt backwards and is pronounced ‘Woz-gidge’. *(Source NPD Full Year 2018) Falcon de luxe Today’s Falcon de luxe puzzles are designed and crafted with the same passion for excellence that we have always had. They celebrate Falcon’s distinctive brand values of heritage and innovation. We choose only the most suitable illustrations for our jigsaws. We die-cut each jigsaw piece carefully, so when the jigsaw is completed, it looks more like a poster than a puzzle. Making jigsaws has always been, and will always remain, our passion. Jan van Haasteren For decades, Jan van Haasteren has created highly detailed, colourful and noticeably humorous illustrations exclusively for Jumbo - and 2019 is no exception! Most of Jan's fans will immediately search for his comedic signature traits - the sharks fin - that is featured in every single one of his jigsaw puzzles. But you can also look out for some of his other favourites such as; Saint Nicholas, the hands, the dentures and Jan's self-portrait which can be found in nearly all of his illustrations. We have a fantastic range of 500 to 3000 piece jigsaw puzzles. Premium Collection Jumbo's extensive Premium Puzzle Collection includes a variety of popular themes that puzzlers love. You can enjoy a range of photos and illustrations from wild animals to big cities, and cute pets to amazing glimpses of nature. More brands... Puzzle Mates Puzzle Mates is the one-stop-shop brand for puzzlers to purchase puzzle accessories to help build, sort and store their puzzles. Within Puzzle Mates is the Portapuzzle range. This is the UK's most popular choice of puzzle accessory*. The Portapuzzle range is a collection of high quality puzzle boards and inserts that, when closed, keep all your jigsaw pieces safe and secure. Each Portapuzzle is fitted with a special non-slip lining designed to improve the quality of puzzling. Puzzle & Roll is also a part of Puzzle Mates. Puzzle & Roll is the idea puzzle accessory for piecing together, storing and transporting your unfinished jigsaw puzzles. GOULA GOULA is the trustworthy, high quality brand that has been creating wooden toys, puzzles and games for over 75 years! Our range starts for children aged 1+. What are you waiting for? Search for GOULA today! Jumbo Established in 1853, The Royal Jumbo Group is one of the oldest toy companies in Europe and develops, manufactures and sells games, puzzles and toys. Quality has been an obsession at Jumbo for the last 165 years. Ever since we first began creating jigsaw puzzles, we have used the most exacting techniques to ensure we produce puzzles of the finest technology.
